dont: Do not delay more than 3 days
Do not miss deadline
Do not add courses without approval
Do not share your password
Do not use weak passwords

steps: Go to the Registrar Office immediately
Explain your reason for missing registration
dont: Do not ignore deadlines
Do not wait until semester progresses too far

steps: If unresolved, go to Department Head
dont: Do not skip instructor discussion
Do not submit complaint without evidence

steps: Clearly label donation boxes as 'Not Garbage'
Inform all cleaning staff about donation box locations
Report if a donation box is emptied as trash
Request locked or monitored donation boxes
dont: Do not put actual garbage in donation boxes
Do not assume cleaners know the purpose

steps: Report the specific floor and building to maintenance
Request regular cleaning schedule for academic buildings
Ask for bathrooms to be unlocked during class hours
Complain to the department head if recurring
dont: Do not use locked bathrooms (find alternative)
Do not ignore foul smells - report immediately

steps: Ask exam proctors for a phone collection table at exam hall entrance
Request secure storage in the dormitory during exam hours
Do not bring valuables to exam hall if no storage is provided
Lodge a formal complaint if phones are stolen from designated areas
dont: Do not leave phone in an unlocked locker
Do not bring phone into exam hall if prohibited
exam_phone_security.office: Exam Coordination Office or Student Union

steps: Visit all required offices (Library, Dorm, Finance)
dont: Do not miss any required office
Do not submit incomplete forms
Do not provide incorrect personal details
Do not forget payment receipt

steps: Report exact location to Student Union
Follow up every 2 days until repaired
dont: Do not ignore small leaks
Do not try to fix it yourself

steps: Report exact location (e.g., near laboratory launch area) to Student Union immediately
Request sanitation team to remove carcass
If health hazard, contact campus clinic
Follow up within hours (not days) to avoid smell
dont: Do not touch the dead animal with bare hands
Do not wait for smell to worsen

steps: Use the provided link (cutt.ly/id-problem) to submit a current photo
Ensure photo matches your current appearance
If system rejects, go to ID Office in person
Request manual update of photo in database
dont: Do not submit blurry or filtered photos
Do not use someone else's photo
id_scanner_photo_mismatch.office: ID Office / Student Union (for link assistance)

steps: Ask Student Union for clarification on 'non-cafe birr'
Request an itemized breakdown of fees from Finance Office
If it's a mistaken charge, file a dispute with receipt
Do not pay without understanding the fee
dont: Do not ignore the charge (it may block registration)
Do not pay cash without receipt
